# PartsNow — Ask Michael (AI truck parts assistant)

> Michael is the free AI specialist at PartsNow.ai for heavy-duty truck and trailer parts. He helps owner-operators, mechanics, and fleets diagnose problems and find the right part — by chat, phone, or text, in English or Spanish, 24/7. Based in Knoxville, TN; ships nationwide across the United States. No account required, and the help is free whether you buy or not.

## Contact
- Chat with Michael: https://agent.partsnow.ai
- Call or text: (865) 290-5485 (English or Spanish, calls and texts)
- Full catalog & checkout: https://partsnow.ai

## What Michael does
- Diagnoses truck symptoms from plain descriptions — no part number or technical terms needed
- Identifies parts from a photo or a VIN
- Recommends the right part plus a budget alternative when it makes sense
- Orders from PartsNow.ai (new or OEM) with nationwide shipping or free pickup in Knoxville, TN
- Answers in the same language you write or speak (English or Spanish)

## Coverage
- Heavy-duty trucks & trailers: Freightliner, Peterbilt, Kenworth, Mack, Volvo, International
- Categories: brakes & wheel end, air system, electrical & lighting, engine, filtration, trailer parts, driveline, hydraulics
- 50,000+ new and OEM parts with OEM cross-references from trusted dealers

## Links
- [Chat with Michael](https://agent.partsnow.ai): Free AI truck parts consultant
- [PartsNow catalog](https://partsnow.ai): Browse and buy 50,000+ parts
- [PartsNow llms.txt](https://partsnow.ai/llms.txt): Platform-level AI documentation
